headline: Calgon Carbon Wins AWWA Innovation Award for PFAS Destruction Breakthrough
summary: Peer-reviewed research documents a destruction removal efficiency greater than 99.9% for PFAS during granular activated carbon reactivationWASHINGTON, June 25, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Calgon Carbon Corporation (“Calgon Carbon”), a wholly owned subsidiary of Kuraray Co., Ltd. (TYO: 3405) (“Kuraray”), has won the 2026 American Water Works Association (AWWA) Innovation Award for its research demonstrating that per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS) are destroyed during Calgon Carbon’s propriet
